rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF RENNA HOLMES
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petitioner'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, FEBRUARY 20, 2008 LINE 1. PETITIONER'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS GRANTED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. THE APPEAL OF THE ANTI-SLAPP MOTION IS NOT A BASIS FOR DEFERRING A RULING ON THIS MOTION FOR MR. CHOYCE IS NOT INVOLVED IN THE ANTI-SLAPP MOTION. THE ALLEGATIONS OF THE COMPLAINT, PARAGRAPHS SIX, TEN, TWELVE AND FOURTEEN, STATE A MALPRACTICE CLAIM, NOT A FRAUD CLAIM. THE ALLEGATIONS OF FRAUD ARE CONTRADICTED BY ALLEGATIONS THAT THE WILL WAS READ TO THE DECEDENT. THE COMPLAINT FAILS TO ALLEGE A DUTY OF CARE BECAUSE COLVIN WAS NOT AN INTENDED BENEFICIARY AND NO FACTS ARE ALLEGED THAT ESTABLISH A FIDUCIARY RELATIONSHIP BEWTWEEN COLVIN AND CHOYCE. =(302/PJM/VC)
